sources.title: Azure Cost Management Export to ADX
sources.evidence: Export mechanisms and schema for cost data

sources.title: ADX Query Language (KQL) for Cost Analysis

claims_to_verify: ADX is cheaper than BI tools for cost analytics
Real-time cost data is achievable (not just daily/monthly)
ADX setup for cost analytics takes <1 day
